name_en: 🆕 【Top-tier Original】M13187 Embossed Passport 👏👏 The "Couvertaux Passport NM" uses mask-shadow leather to protect the passport while looking beautiful. The unintentional embossing on the leather creates a single pattern, adding understated charm and functional accessories. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5.
